reason: Sharpened blades, sharp wit and relentless slasher thrills.
A massacre in a warehouse leaves no shortage of bleeding and swearing.
Hyper-stylized violence unleashed in interlocking criminal tales.
A bloodthirsty spree rendered with hallucinatory excess.
Sequels sharpen the blade with even more screams and spills.
Twisted obsession unfolds in sudden bursts of gruesome violence.
Body count soars as a plague of the undead devours all restraint.
A cartoonishly gory romp that redefines over-the-top splatter.
High-octane gore and sweat-soaked thrills on a haunted desert road.
Graveyard carnage meets slapstick in this undead gorefest.
